The '''''Masanya''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] manufactured by the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] that was used by the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|fleet]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] as a light escort [[Starship/Legends|vessel]]. It was modified with a [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] for small vessels and equipped with [[Missile/Legends|missile]]-[[Jammer/Legends|jamming]] [[Electronic countermeasures/Legends|target-disruption scanners]]. It fought in the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], a decisive engagement between the Rebel Alliance and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Description==
[[File:Masanya-JK.jpg|thumb|left|200px|The ''Masanya'' from the aft]]
The ''Masanya'' was a light escort [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] manufactured by the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]]. It was [[Color/Legends|colored]] white with red markings at the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]—a conflict between the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]—and was outfitted by [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Rebel fleet]] [[Technician/Legends|technicians]] with [[Electronic countermeasures/Legends|advanced scanners]] designed to continuously [[Jammer/Legends|disrupt]] target-acquisition signals, making it impossible for [[Missile/Legends|missile]] [[Targeting computer/Legends|guidance systems]] to lock onto the [[Starship/Legends|ship]].<ref name="SWCCG" /> The [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] was valuable as an escort for larger [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]], as it was equipped with a [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]] for small craft such as [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]],<ref name="SWPM" /><ref name="SWCCG" /> and [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]] for defensive cover fire. Its modifications were made at the expense of [[Hull/Legends|hull]] strength, however, making it slightly more vulnerable to damage than other contemporary CR90 corvettes.<ref name="SWPM" />

==History==
The ''Masanya'' was acquired by the Rebel Alliance and incorporated into its fleet early in the Galactic Civil War.<ref name="RotJ" /> It was frequently used to provide escort support for [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruisers]] and was part of the [[Defiance Task Force]]. It was personally assigned by Rebel [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]] to the main Rebel fleet at the Battle of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]],<ref name="SWCCG" /> in which it participated.<ref name="RotJ" />

==Behind the scenes==
An unidentified, red-trimmed CR90 corvette that would later be identified as the ''Masanya'' first appeared during the Battle of Endor in [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']].<ref name="RotJ" /> The name "''Masanya''" was later applied to a corvette in ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'', a computer game published by [[LucasArts]] on [[February 28]], [[1999]].<ref name="XWA" /> The following year, in [[July]] of [[2000]], [[Decipher]] published the ''[[Death Star II Limited]]'' expansion of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]], which tied the ''Masanya'' identified in the computer game to the red-trimmed CR90 corvette seen in ''Return of the Jedi''.<ref name="SWCCG" /><ref name="RotJ" />

On [[February 16]], [[2006]], [[LucasArts]] released ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'', in which the ''Masanya'' appeared as one of several [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] corvettes randomly labeled in the game's space battles.<ref name="EAW">''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''</ref> In the ''[[Star Wars PocketModel TCG]]'', a trading card strategy game published by [[WizKids Games]] in [[2007]], the ''Masanya'' is represented by a miniature marked with blue trim instead of the red trim previously associated with the ship.<ref name="SWPM" />
